# Mushi Mushi

> Know why your AI-built app broke — plain-English diagnosis + ready fix, in your editor. Open source. Sentry optional.

Canonical docs: https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs
Product home: https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi
GitHub: https://github.com/kensaurus/mushi-mushi
npm org: https://www.npmjs.com/org/mushi-mushi

## Start here (MCP-first)

- [Incident loop](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/quickstart/incident-loop)
- [MCP server](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/quickstart/mcp)
- [Choose your stack](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/quickstart)

## SDK quickstarts

- [React](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/quickstart/react)
- [Web / vanilla JS](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/quickstart/web)
- [React Native](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/quickstart/react-native)

## SDK reference

- [SDK index](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/sdks)
- [Project ID & API keys](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/concepts/credentials)
- [@mushi-mushi/web](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/sdks/web)
- [@mushi-mushi/cli](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/sdks/cli)
- [@mushi-mushi/mcp](https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi/docs/sdks/mcp)
